hero.title: The world watches those who appear. UPLY rewards those who achieve.
hero.subtitle: Join the first meritocratic platform that turns real results into opportunities.

ecosystem.card1_desc: No more empty content. On Uply <1>expertise is the only currency</1>. An ecosystem where every interaction rewards the real value you bring to the community.
ecosystem.card2_desc: From university notes to high-quality video lessons and podcasts. A space where information <1>is not fleeting entertainment</1>, but a fundamental pillar for your professional growth.
ecosystem.card3_desc: Connect with <1>investors and companies</1>. On Uply you don't show how you spend your time: you show how much you are worth to unlock your next opportunity.
ecosystem.waitlist_subtitle: Join the waitlist to receive exclusive Beta access as soon as it's ready.

about.title: Beyond visibility. Your value, finally measurable.
about.subtitle: Stop chasing algorithms. Start building real impact in an ecosystem designed for those who truly achieve.

per_te.title: For You
per_te.desc: Your cognitive mirror. Receive opportunities and people that expand your boundaries, not just your likes.

extended.overview: Forget tamed feeds. Our algorithm seeks your next intellectual challenge based on your real potential.

media.title: Media
media.desc: The archive of excellence. High-cognitive value content, from posts to documents, verified by Guardian AI.

extended.overview: Every resource is analyzed to ensure its integrity and usefulness in your continuous growth journey.

eventi.title: Events & Live
eventi.desc: High-frequency connections. Join live experiences where theory becomes practice and meet the mentors.

extended.overview: Attend talks, challenges, and mini-forums. Every event is a networking opportunity verified by AI.

progetti.title: Projects & Collaborations
progetti.desc: Factory of the Future. Find the ideal partner to scale projects that leave a mark.

extended.overview: Match AI analyzes your skills and connects you with ideal partners to build high-impact teams.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.desc: The economy of merit. Exchange skills and resources in the first market regulated by real value.

extended.overview: Turn your talent into Seeds. An ethical market where quality and impact beat price.

impact.title: Impact Index
impact.desc: You are not a follower count. You are the tangible result of the impact you generate every day.

extended.overview: The Impact Index measures the quality and consistency of your real contribution to the ecosystem.

wallet.title: Seeds Wallet
wallet.desc: The currency that rewards creators. Manage the earnings derived from your real contribution.

extended.overview: Seeds are the unit of value of UPLY, rewarding action and produced knowledge.

guardian.title: Ethics & Security
guardian.desc: The invisible layer that protects your identity and guarantees the meritocracy of the system.

extended.overview: Guardian AI monitors every interaction to prevent manipulation and guarantee absolute fairness.

mentor.title: Mentor AI
mentor.desc: Your guide towards cognitive evolution. Targeted suggestions to accelerate your growth.

extended.overview: Mentor AI analyzes your potential and proposes the perfect resource at the exact moment of need.

beta.title: UPLY Beta is coming
beta.subtitle: Leave your email to join the waitlist and get exclusive early access as soon as the platform is ready.

pricing.title: UPLY Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best suits your journey and access the tools to grow in the meritocratic network.

features.2: Full access to Discover and Marketplace
features.3: Chat, collaborations, and base Seeds (up to 50/month)

features.7: Priority support and Business Verified badge

contacts.title: Contact Us
contacts.subtitle: Have questions, ideas, or want to collaborate with UPLY? Our team always replies.

cookies.message: We use technical and functional cookies to offer you a better experience. Accept them to continue.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sec1_desc: The Data Controller is Uply. You can contact us at any time for privacy-related questions.
privacy.sec2_desc: During the Beta Waitlist phase, we exclusively collect your email address. We do not collect sensitive data or phone numbers.
privacy.sec3_desc: Your email address is used solely to add you to the waitlist and notify you of the platform's official launch. Your data will not be sold to third parties, and you will not receive unsolicited spam.
privacy.sec4_desc: Under the GDPR, you have the right to request access, modification, or deletion of your data (Right to be forgotten) at any time by contacting us directly.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.p1: This Cookie Policy explains how Uply uses cookies on its website. Currently, our landing page uses <1>exclusively technical and strictly necessary cookies</1> to ensure the proper functioning of the site and its animations.
cookie.p2: We do not use profiling cookies to track your behavior for advertising purposes, and we do not sell browsing data to third parties.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.p1: By joining the Uply Waitlist, you agree to receive email communications regarding the development, launch, and news of the platform.
terms.p2: Joining the waitlist does not guarantee immediate access to the platform. Beta access will be granted in batches at the sole discretion of the Uply team to ensure server stability and an optimal experience.
terms.p3: Uply reserves the right to remove invalid, temporary, or suspected bot email addresses from the Waitlist.
